title: Project Manager
description: Technical Project Manager leading end-to-end delivery of an e-commerce platform, combining strategy, execution, and hands-on technical expertise.

responsibilities: Lead end-to-end project delivery for a complex e-commerce platform
Manage and coordinate a cross-functional team of 6–7 developers, designers, and marketers
Translate business requirements into actionable technical and operational plans
Define project timelines, assign tasks, and track progress using ClickUp
Facilitate team meetings and ensure alignment across stakeholders
Act as the primary point of contact for client communication and reporting
Manage risks proactively and resolve blockers to maintain delivery timelines
technical_contributions: Lead technical SEO strategy and implementation
Contribute directly to code when needed as a developer
Oversee and optimize UX decisions based on user behavior and performance
Conduct QA testing to ensure high-quality releases
Bridge communication between technical and non-technical teams
impact: Reduced project delivery time through improved planning and coordination
Accelerated bug resolution by streamlining communication and QA processes
Improved website performance and visibility through technical SEO initiatives
Enhanced internal workflows by identifying and resolving process inefficiencies
key_strengths: Strong technical background as a developer
Ability to combine strategy with execution
Cross-functional leadership and communication
Problem-solving and process optimization

title: WordPress Developer | eCommerce Developer
description: WordPress and eCommerce developer responsible for full-site development, performance optimization, and backend ownership of a high-traffic WooCommerce-based platform.

responsibilities: Resolved 200+ WordPress issues including bugs, UI fixes, plugin conflicts, and checkout-related problems
Developed custom code snippets and theme-level modifications to extend WordPress functionality
Worked extensively with WooCommerce and Elementor to build and maintain eCommerce features
Owned backend development responsibilities, ensuring system stability and functionality
Implemented performance optimizations to improve site speed and user experience
Maintained and enhanced core website features across both desktop and mobile platforms
technical_contributions: Built custom WordPress functionality using PHP-based theme modifications and code snippets
Handled WooCommerce eCommerce flows including product pages and checkout experience
Improved website performance through optimization of assets, structure, and rendering efficiency
Resolved plugin conflicts and ensured compatibility across multiple WordPress extensions
Worked directly on backend systems and logic to support business requirements
impact: Resolved 200+ critical website issues improving overall platform stability
Improved site performance and responsiveness across devices through optimization work
Enhanced eCommerce user experience by fixing checkout flow and functional issues
Ensured continuous platform reliability through proactive bug fixing and maintenance
key_strengths: Strong hands-on WordPress development expertise
Backend ownership and problem-solving capability
eCommerce system understanding (WooCommerce)
Performance optimization and debugging skills
Ability to work independently on complex production systems

title: Software Developer
description: Full-stack developer contributing to a multi-user SaaS note management system, focusing on frontend-backend integration, API testing, and quality assurance in a small development team.

responsibilities: Worked on a multi-user SaaS note management system for end users
Implemented frontend-backend integration using Laravel-based architecture
Developed and tested internal APIs to ensure system functionality
Performed manual QA testing and reported bugs for production stability
Collaborated with a small development team and executed assigned tasks
Contributed to improving system reliability through continuous testing and fixes
technical_contributions: Worked with Laravel-based backend systems for API integration
Tested and validated internal APIs using Postman
Supported frontend-backend data flow integration
Identified and reported bugs during QA testing cycles
Ensured correct data handling between client-side and server-side systems
impact: Improved system reliability through consistent API testing and bug reporting
Ensured stable frontend-backend integration for a multi-user SaaS platform
Contributed to smoother end-user experience through QA-driven improvements
Supported development cycle efficiency in a small agile team environment
key_strengths: Full-stack integration understanding (frontend + backend)
API testing and validation skills
Attention to detail in QA and bug reporting
Ability to work in small agile teams
Experience with SaaS-based multi-user systems

title: PHP Developer
description: PHP Developer working on enterprise internal systems, building an HR Management System using the LAMP stack to automate workflows and improve operational efficiency.

responsibilities: Designed and developed an HR Management System for internal organizational use
Built backend functionality using PHP within a LAMP stack environment
Implemented core HR workflows including employee data management and record handling
Deployed and maintained system features to support business operations
Worked on system improvements to reduce manual processes and improve usability
technical_contributions: Developed backend modules using PHP and MySQL within a LAMP stack architecture
Designed and implemented database structures for HR-related data management
Built and deployed server-side application logic for internal enterprise workflows
Improved system automation to reduce manual HR data processing
Supported system stability through bug fixes and iterative enhancements
impact: Automated HR workflows, reducing manual data entry significantly
Improved operational efficiency through centralized HR system implementation
Enhanced data accuracy and consistency across HR processes
Delivered a scalable internal system supporting organizational operations
key_strengths: Strong foundation in backend development with PHP
Experience building enterprise internal systems
Database design and system architecture understanding
Ability to optimize manual workflows through automation
Experience working in structured remote development environments

title: Web Developer
description: Web Developer responsible for end-to-end development, deployment, and quality assurance of web solutions for educational institutions.

responsibilities: Independently designed and developed web solutions for educational institutions
Managed full software lifecycle including development, deployment, and maintenance
Ensured software quality through manual testing and validation
Delivered tailored solutions based on client requirements in the education sector
Handled end-to-end responsibility for project execution
technical_contributions: Built and deployed web applications for institutional use
Implemented functional features based on client requirements
Performed software testing and quality assurance before deployment
Managed hosting and deployment setup for delivered solutions
Ensured system reliability and usability for end users
impact: Delivered functional web solutions for educational institutions
Improved operational efficiency through digitized workflows
Ensured reliable system performance through testing and validation
Provided end-to-end delivery without dependency on external developers
key_strengths: Full project ownership from development to deployment
Strong problem-solving and independent working ability
Understanding of client requirements and solution delivery
Foundational experience in real-world web development
Quality assurance and reliability focus
